runs.text: Treasures from the Public Domain: Variations Quatre Vingt Six Motifs
Enjoy a collection of vibrant floral Art Deco patterns from Variations Quatre-Vingt-Six Motifs by the French chemist, composer and textile designer Edouard Benedictus (1878-1930).
Just invite 10 friends, family, coworkers or social media followers and enjoy one year's free premium design resources.
Visit your referral page to learn how you can invite your friends or simply share your personal referral link below.
